tool.name: Taffy sort
tool.command:
## Set variables @SET_UNCOMPRESS_NAMES@
## Uncompress input files if necessary and create symlinks for uncompressed files @UNCOMPRESS_TAF_AND_MAF@
## Run main command taffy sort --logLevel 'INFO' --inputFile '$uncompressed_input' $sorting.dontIgnoreFirstRow #if $sorting.sortFile.value == 'true': --sortFile '$sorting.sortFile.input_sort_file' #end if #if $sorting.filterFile.value == 'true': --filterFile '$sorting.filterFile.input_filter_file' #end if #if $sorting.duplicateFile.value == 'true': --dupFilterFile '$sorting.duplicateFile.input_dup_file' #end if #if $paddingFile.value == 'true': --padFile '$paddingFile.input_pad_file' #end if --repeatCoordinatesEveryNColumns $repeatCoordinatesEveryNColumns
## Compress TAF output if requested by user @COMPRESS_TAF@

param.label: Include reference row
param.help: By default, the first row of an alignment block (the reference) is protected by any of the below modifications. Check this to allow the reference row to be treated the same along with the others

param.name: value
param.label: Custom sorting order
param.option: Yes, use a custom sorting order (--sortFile)

param.name: input_sort_file
param.label: Custom sorting file
param.help: A text file where each line is a prefix of a sequence name. The alignment rows will be sorted to match the order of the prefixes in this file

param.name: value
param.label: Remove rows
param.option: Yes, remove rows matching prefixes in a file (--filterFile)

param.name: input_filter_file
param.label: Removal filter file
param.help: A text file where each line is a prefix of a sequence name. Any alignment row whose sequence name starts with one of these prefixes will be removed in the output

param.name: value
param.label: Remove only duplicate rows
param.option: Yes, remove duplicates matching prefixes in a file (--dupFilterFile)

param.name: input_dup_file
param.label: Duplicate filter file
param.help: A text file where each line is a prefix of a sequence name. If multiple rows in a block match a prefix, only the first occurrence is kept

param.name: value
param.label: Pad alignment blocks with missing sequences
param.option: Yes, add missing sequences to blocks (--padFile)

param.name: input_pad_file
param.label: Padding file
param.help: A text file where each line is a prefix of a sequence name. If an alignment block is missing a row matching a prefix, a new row is added which uses the prefix as its name. The new row consists entirely of gaps, has a positive strand with dummy coordinates (start 0, length 0)

has_text.text: GGGGGGGGG ; i 0 Anc0.Anc0refChr0 0 + 4151 i 1 Anc1.Anc1refChr1 292714 + 296994 i 2 Anc2.Anc2refChr1
GGGGGGGGG ; i 0 Anc0.Anc0refChr0 0 + 4151 i 1 simRat_chr6.simRat.chr6 642153 + 647215 i 2 simMouse_chr6.simMouse.chr6
GGGGGGGGG ; i 0 Anc0.Anc0refChr0 0 + 4151 i 1 Anc1.Anc1refChr1 292714 + 296994 i 2 Anc2.Anc2refChr1
GGGGGGGGG ; i 0 simRat_chr6.simRat.chr6 642153 + 647215 i 1 simMouse_chr6.simMouse.chr6 630640 + 636262 i 2 simHuman_chr6.simHuman.chr6
GGGGGGGGG ; i 0 Anc0.Anc0refChr0 0 + 4151 i 1 Anc1.Anc1refChr1 292714 + 296994 i 2 Anc2.Anc2refChr1
GGGGGGGGG ; i 0 simRat_chr6.simRat.chr6 642153 + 647215 i 1 simMouse_chr6.simMouse.chr6 630640 + 636262 i 2 simHuman_chr6.simHuman.chr6

tool.help:
Taffy sort orders alignment rows according to a given prefix list. It supports:
- **Custom sorting order:** Sorts rows based on a given file of sequence name prefixes.
- **Removal of rows:** Removes rows matching specific sequence name prefixes.
- **Removal of duplicate rows:** Keeps only the first occurrence of rows matching specific sequence name prefixes.
- **Padding alignment blocks with missing sequences:** Adds gap-filled rows for missing sequences to ensure a consistent set of rows across blocks. For any sequence prefix in a given file, if the block does not contain a row whose name starts with that prefix, a new row is appended. This new row uses the prefix as its name, consists entirely of gaps, and has a positive strand with dummy coordinates (start 0, length 0).
The tool also allows for the optional inclusion of the reference row while sorting and removing (which is otherwise protected). Use this tool to standardize row order, clean alignments, and enforce consistent sequence structure across TAF files.
